name: Honey-Baked Ham
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup cooking wine or red sherry
recipeInstructions: Cut the fat off of the ham. Prepare the glaze by combining ingredients in a saucepan and bringing to a boil. Drizzle the glaze over the ham the night before. Bake at 275 degrees for 5 to 7 hours - first 2 hours, keep the ham covered. Then uncover and baste every hour, turning the ham on all sides. Slice and serve with glaze sauce, if desired.
